blueprint_coaster_vector_return_mk_ii_01.source: This layout takes your guests there and back again through awesome inversions!
blueprint_coaster_vector_return_mk_ii_01.translation: This layout takes your guests there and back again through awesome inversions!

buildingpartname_sf_wall_metal_alloy_mer.source: Metal Alloy Wall - 4 x 2m Curved Slope
buildingpartname_sf_wall_metal_alloy_mer.translation: Metal Alloy Wall - 4 x 2m Curved Slope

buildingpartname_sf_wall_metal_alloy_mer.source: Metal Alloy Wall - 4 x 2m Inverse Slope
buildingpartname_sf_wall_metal_alloy_mer.translation: Metal Alloy Wall - 4 x 2m Inverse Slope

coaster_cc_trident_desc.source: This coaster shuttles guests to the end of the track, then rebounds them back to the start in reverse!
coaster_cc_trident_desc.translation: This coaster shuttles guests to the end of the track, then rebounds them back to the start in reverse!

guest_thought_parkexit_guestejected_comm.source: I'm never going back to that park again! They ejected me but I didn't do anything wrong!
guest_thought_parkexit_guestejected_comm.translation: I'm never going back to that park again! They ejected me but I didn't do anything wrong!

guest_thought_parkexit_pickpocketejected.source: Security at that park was high! I got caught for pickpocketing.
guest_thought_parkexit_pickpocketejected.translation: Security at that park was high! I got caught for pickpocketing.

guest_thought_parkexit_shoplifterejected.source: They were right to eject me from the park. I stole something in anger: I shouldn't have done that.
guest_thought_parkexit_shoplifterejected.translation: They were right to eject me from the park. I stole something in anger: I shouldn't have done that.

guest_thought_parkexit_vandalejected_com.source: They were right to eject me from the park: I broke something in anger, I shouldn't have done that.
guest_thought_parkexit_vandalejected_com.translation: They were right to eject me from the park: I broke something in anger, I shouldn't have done that.

guest_thought_pickpocket_caughtbysecurit.source: Game over, security have caught me.
guest_thought_pickpocket_caughtbysecurit.translation: Game over, security have caught me.

guest_thought_pickpocket_caughtbysecurit.source: Caught by security, maybe it’s time to change my ways.
guest_thought_pickpocket_caughtbysecurit.translation: Caught by security, maybe it’s time to change my ways.

guest_thought_pickpocket_escapedsecurity.source: Security evaded, I live to steal another day.
guest_thought_pickpocket_escapedsecurity.translation: Security evaded, I live to steal another day.

guest_thought_pickpocket_escapedsecurity.source: I’m too fast for these security guards.
guest_thought_pickpocket_escapedsecurity.translation: I’m too fast for these security guards.

guest_thought_pickpocket_groupwaspickpoc.source: I can't believe one of us has been pickpocketed! When did that happen?!
guest_thought_pickpocket_groupwaspickpoc.translation: I can't believe one of us has been pickpocketed! When did that happen?!

guest_thought_pickpocket_groupwaspickpoc.source: One of us was pickpocketed somewhere! There are thieves about!
guest_thought_pickpocket_groupwaspickpoc.translation: One of us was pickpocketed somewhere! There are thieves about!

guest_thought_pickpocket_groupwaspickpoc.source: What?! Someone stole money from one of us?! Unbelievable!
guest_thought_pickpocket_groupwaspickpoc.translation: What?! Someone stole money from one of us?! Unbelievable!

guest_thought_pickpocket_guestwaspickpoc.source: I've been robbed! When did that happen?!
guest_thought_pickpocket_guestwaspickpoc.translation: I've been robbed! When did that happen?!

guest_thought_pickpocket_guestwaspickpoc.source: Wait, what's happened to my money? Someone has stolen from me!
guest_thought_pickpocket_guestwaspickpoc.translation: Wait, what's happened to my money? Someone has stolen from me!

guest_thought_pickpocket_guestwaspickpoc.source: I had more money than that, at some point I must have been pickpocketed!
guest_thought_pickpocket_guestwaspickpoc.translation: I had more money than that, at some point I must have been pickpocketed!

guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparksucces.source: I’ve stolen enough for now, time to leave and enjoy the proceeds of crime.
guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparksucces.translation: I’ve stolen enough for now, time to leave and enjoy the proceeds of crime.

guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparksucces.source: That’s enough pickpocketing for now, I’m off to enjoy my takings.
guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparksucces.translation: That’s enough pickpocketing for now, I’m off to enjoy my takings.

guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparksucces.source: My pockets are loaded, I’ve picked enough of other people’s for now. Time to leave.
guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparksucces.translation: My pockets are loaded, I’ve picked enough of other people’s for now. Time to leave.

guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparkunsucc.source: Security is too high at this park, I’m off to try another.
guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparkunsucc.translation: Security is too high at this park, I’m off to try another.

guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparkunsucc.source: This park has higher security than Fort Knox! I’m leaving.
guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparkunsucc.translation: This park has higher security than Fort Knox! I’m leaving.

guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparkunsucc.source: The Crown Jewels have less security than this park! I give up.
guest_thought_pickpocket_leaveparkunsucc.translation: The Crown Jewels have less security than this park! I give up.

guest_thought_pickpocket_readytosteal_co.source: No security around, time to pick some pockets.
guest_thought_pickpocket_readytosteal_co.translation: No security around, time to pick some pockets.

guest_thought_pickpocket_readytosteal_co.source: I’m going to pick your pocket.
guest_thought_pickpocket_readytosteal_co.translation: I’m going to pick your pocket.

guest_thought_pickpocket_readytostealven.source: No security around, time to check the vending machines.
guest_thought_pickpocket_readytostealven.translation: No security around, time to check the vending machines.

guest_thought_pickpocket_readytostealven.source: What do you have for me to steal, vending machine?
guest_thought_pickpocket_readytostealven.translation: What do you have for me to steal, vending machine?

guest_thought_pickpocket_readytostealven.source: I'm glad this vending machine offers a five-finger discount.
guest_thought_pickpocket_readytostealven.translation: I'm glad this vending machine offers a five-finger discount.

guest_thought_pickpocket_recoverstolenca.source: Fantastic! They've caught the pickpocket and returned all of my stolen money to me. Security here is great!
guest_thought_pickpocket_recoverstolenca.translation: Fantastic! They've caught the pickpocket and returned all of my stolen money to me. Security here is great!

guest_thought_pickpocket_recoverstolenca.source: Amazing! All of the money that pickpocket stole has been returned to me! Thank you park security!
guest_thought_pickpocket_recoverstolenca.translation: Amazing! All of the money that pickpocket stole has been returned to me! Thank you park security!

guest_thought_pickpocket_spottedbysecuri.source: I’ve been spotted by security, run!
guest_thought_pickpocket_spottedbysecuri.translation: I’ve been spotted by security, run!

guest_thought_pickpocket_successfulsteal.source: Picked from your pocket, into mine.
guest_thought_pickpocket_successfulsteal.translation: Picked from your pocket, into mine.

guest_thought_pickpocket_successfulsteal.source: Why pay when you can steal.
guest_thought_pickpocket_successfulsteal.translation: Why pay when you can steal.

guest_thought_pickpocket_successfulsteal.source: Thanks for the free stuff, machine.
guest_thought_pickpocket_successfulsteal.translation: Thanks for the free stuff, machine.

guest_thought_pickpocket_successfulsteal.source: It's so easy to steal from that vending machine!
guest_thought_pickpocket_successfulsteal.translation: It's so easy to steal from that vending machine!

guest_thought_security_guardapprehension.source: Yes! Good to see security here catching and dealing with criminals.
guest_thought_security_guardapprehension.translation: Yes! Good to see security here catching and dealing with criminals.

guest_thought_security_guardapprehension.source: Good work guard, get that criminal out of here!
guest_thought_security_guardapprehension.translation: Good work guard, get that criminal out of here!

guest_thought_security_guardapprehension.source: That security guard caught a baddie!
guest_thought_security_guardapprehension.translation: That security guard caught a baddie!

guest_thought_security_guardapprehension.source: Why is there lots of shouting? Did that person do something wrong?
guest_thought_security_guardapprehension.translation: Why is there lots of shouting? Did that person do something wrong?

guest_thought_security_guardchase_child_.source: I hope I can run that fast when I grow up!
guest_thought_security_guardchase_child_.translation: I hope I can run that fast when I grow up!

guest_thought_security_guardchase_child_.source: Wow! Look how fast that guard is running!
guest_thought_security_guardchase_child_.translation: Wow! Look how fast that guard is running!

guest_thought_security_guardchase_child_.source: That security guard is chasing someone!
guest_thought_security_guardchase_child_.translation: That security guard is chasing someone!

guest_thought_security_guardchase_common.source: That guard must be chasing someone!
guest_thought_security_guardchase_common.translation: That guard must be chasing someone!

guest_thought_security_guardchase_common.source: Wow! That guard is flying by!
guest_thought_security_guardchase_common.translation: Wow! That guard is flying by!

guest_thought_security_guestejected_comm.source: I've been asked to leave the park but I haven't done anything wrong! I'm going to the newspapers about this!
guest_thought_security_guestejected_comm.translation: I've been asked to leave the park but I haven't done anything wrong! I'm going to the newspapers about this!

guest_thought_security_guestejected_comm.source: I'm innocent! Why have I been asked to leave? This isn't fair!
guest_thought_security_guestejected_comm.translation: I'm innocent! Why have I been asked to leave? This isn't fair!

guest_thought_security_guestejected_comm.source: How dare they ask me to leave when I've done nothing wrong. They'll pay for this!
guest_thought_security_guestejected_comm.translation: How dare they ask me to leave when I've done nothing wrong. They'll pay for this!

guest_thought_security_guestejected_comm.source: I can't believe they've asked me to leave, I've never broken the law in my life! This isn't the end...!
guest_thought_security_guestejected_comm.translation: I can't believe they've asked me to leave, I've never broken the law in my life! This isn't the end...!

guest_thought_security_shoplifterejected.source: I've been asked to leave because I stole from the park!
guest_thought_security_shoplifterejected.translation: I've been asked to leave because I stole from the park!

guest_thought_security_shoplifterejected.source: I've been sent home for shoplifting!
guest_thought_security_shoplifterejected.translation: I've been sent home for shoplifting!

guest_thought_security_shoplifterejected.source: Maybe crime doesn't pay. I've been ejected from the park after I stole something.
guest_thought_security_shoplifterejected.translation: Maybe crime doesn't pay. I've been ejected from the park after I stole something.

guest_thought_security_vandalejected_com.source: I've been asked to leave because I vandalised the park!
guest_thought_security_vandalejected_com.translation: I've been asked to leave because I vandalised the park!

guest_thought_security_vandalejected_com.source: I shouldn't have lost my temper and vandalised the park, now I'm being sent home!
guest_thought_security_vandalejected_com.translation: I shouldn't have lost my temper and vandalised the park, now I'm being sent home!

guest_thought_security_vandalejected_com.source: I can't believe I'm being ejected for vandalism!
guest_thought_security_vandalejected_com.translation: I can't believe I'm being ejected for vandalism!

guest_thought_vandalism_goingtoshoplift_.source: This park has made me so angry I'm going to steal something!
guest_thought_vandalism_goingtoshoplift_.translation: This park has made me so angry I'm going to steal something!

guest_thought_vandalism_goingtoshoplift_.source: I wonder if that shop has something for me to steal.
guest_thought_vandalism_goingtoshoplift_.translation: I wonder if that shop has something for me to steal.

guest_thought_vandalism_goingtoshoplift_.source: I'm going to swipe something from that shop.
guest_thought_vandalism_goingtoshoplift_.translation: I'm going to swipe something from that shop.

guest_thought_vandalism_goingtoshoplift_.source: I'm in the mood for some shoplifting.
guest_thought_vandalism_goingtoshoplift_.translation: I'm in the mood for some shoplifting.

guest_thought_vandalism_goingtovandalise.source: This park has made me so angry I'm going to break something!
guest_thought_vandalism_goingtovandalise.translation: This park has made me so angry I'm going to break something!

guest_thought_vandalism_goingtovandalise.source: I need to take this anger out on something!
guest_thought_vandalism_goingtovandalise.translation: I need to take this anger out on something!

guest_thought_vandalism_goingtovandalise.source: Aaargh! I'm going to smash something!
guest_thought_vandalism_goingtovandalise.translation: Aaargh! I'm going to smash something!

guest_thought_vandalism_goingtovandalise.source: What can I hit? I'm so angry!
guest_thought_vandalism_goingtovandalise.translation: What can I hit? I'm so angry!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentsh.source: Someone is stealing things from the shop!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentsh.translation: Someone is stealing things from the shop!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.source: Someone is vandalising things in the park!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.translation: Someone is vandalising things in the park!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.source: Someone's not happy, they're smashing up things in the park!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.translation: Someone's not happy, they're smashing up things in the park!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.source: Someone needs to control their temper and not take it out on other people's property!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.translation: Someone needs to control their temper and not take it out on other people's property!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.source: I'm scared, that person is hitting things!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.translation: I'm scared, that person is hitting things!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.source: Why is that person breaking things?
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.translation: Why is that person breaking things?

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.source: Someone is breaking things in the park!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.translation: Someone is breaking things in the park!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.source: I can't believe they're just breaking things!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.translation: I can't believe they're just breaking things!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.source: That's not cool, someone's breaking things!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentva.translation: That's not cool, someone's breaking things!

guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentve.source: Someone is stealing things from the vending machine!
guest_thought_vandalism_reacttocurrentve.translation: Someone is stealing things from the vending machine!

guest_thought_vandalism_shoplifted_commo.source: Everything in this park is free if you don't pay for it.
guest_thought_vandalism_shoplifted_commo.translation: Everything in this park is free if you don't pay for it.

guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedfacili.source: Someone has damaged this beyond use.
guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedfacili.translation: Someone has damaged this beyond use.

guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.source: That's better, I feel less angry after breaking that!
guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.translation: That's better, I feel less angry after breaking that!

guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.source: Breaking that has made me feel a bit better, for now...
guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.translation: Breaking that has made me feel a bit better, for now...

guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.source: Breaking that has made me feel less angry!
guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.translation: Breaking that has made me feel less angry!

guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.source: It's pretty run down around here.
guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.translation: It's pretty run down around here.

guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.source: Can't they fix these vandalised things?
guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.translation: Can't they fix these vandalised things?

guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.source: There are lots of damaged things around here.
guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.translation: There are lots of damaged things around here.

guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.source: Looks like someone's gone on a rampage!
guest_thought_vandalism_vandalisedobject.translation: Looks like someone's gone on a rampage!

securitycamera_desc.source: A powered security measure that monitors and deters criminal activity.
securitycamera_desc.translation: A powered security measure that monitors and deters criminal activity.

staff_thought_security_chasefail_common_.source: Just need to.... catch my breath...
staff_thought_security_chasefail_common_.translation: Just need to.... catch my breath...

staff_thought_security_chasefail_common_.source: I'll… I'll get you next time…!
staff_thought_security_chasefail_common_.translation: I'll… I'll get you next time…!

staff_thought_security_chasejoin_common_.source: That criminal's getting away! Not on my watch!
staff_thought_security_chasejoin_common_.translation: That criminal's getting away! Not on my watch!

staff_thought_security_chasejoin_common_.source: That criminal's no match for me!
staff_thought_security_chasejoin_common_.translation: That criminal's no match for me!

staff_thought_security_chasestart_common.source: Stop, criminal! Don't make me chase you!
staff_thought_security_chasestart_common.translation: Stop, criminal! Don't make me chase you!

staff_thought_security_chasesuccess_comm.source: Got you! You're coming with me.
staff_thought_security_chasesuccess_comm.translation: Got you! You're coming with me.

staff_thought_security_chasesuccess_comm.source: Thought you'd get away with it, eh? Not with me around!
staff_thought_security_chasesuccess_comm.translation: Thought you'd get away with it, eh? Not with me around!

staff_thought_security_tooquiet_common_0.source: It's quiet around here. Guess I must be doing a good job!
staff_thought_security_tooquiet_common_0.translation: It's quiet around here. Guess I must be doing a good job!

train_cc_ironfurystock.source: High Peaks Construction Wooden Hybrid - Steel Topped (Standard)
train_cc_ironfurystock.translation: High Peaks Construction Wooden Hybrid - Steel Topped (Standard)

train_cc_maliceunchainedstock.source: High Peaks Construction Wooden Hybrid - Steel Rails (Standard)
train_cc_maliceunchainedstock.translation: High Peaks Construction Wooden Hybrid - Steel Rails (Standard)
